questions.question: Rearrange the following parts to form a coherent and meaningful sentence. Choose the correct option. P: and industries are exploring the use of biodegradable alternatives Q: as plastic pollution continues to pose a significant threat to the environment, R: governments, environmental groups, S: to reduce dependence on single-use plastics
questions.explanation: The correct order is: as plastic pollution continues to pose a significant threat to the environment, governments, environmental groups, and industries are exploring biodegradable alternatives to reduce dependence on single-use plastics.

questions.question: Rearrange the following parts to form a meaningful and grammatically correct sentence. Choose the most logical sequence. P: when technology enables constant connectivity, Q: maintaining a healthy work-life balance R: has become increasingly challenging S: in today’s fast-paced digital world
questions.explanation: The correct order is: in today's fast-paced digital world, maintaining a healthy work-life balance, when technology enables constant connectivity, has become increasingly challenging.

questions.question: Rearrange the given sentence fragments to form a meaningful sentence. Choose the correct sequence from the options below. P: are becoming more popular among urban residents Q: rooftop gardens and vertical farming R: as people seek sustainable ways S: to grow food in limited spaces
questions.explanation: The correct order is: rooftop gardens and vertical farming are becoming more popular among urban residents as people seek sustainable ways to grow food in limited spaces.

questions.question: Rearrange the following parts to form a meaningful sentence. Select the correct option. P: scientists have been researching alternative energy sources Q: due to the rising concerns about fossil fuel depletion R: and their impact on climate change S: such as solar and wind power
questions.explanation: The correct order is: due to rising concerns about fossil fuel depletion and their impact on climate change, scientists have been researching alternative energy sources such as solar and wind power.

questions.question: Rearrange the given parts to form a meaningful sentence. Choose the most appropriate order . P: not only improved productivity Q: but also reduced the margin of human error R: automation in manufacturing processes has S: over the past few decades
questions.explanation: The correct order is: automation in manufacturing processes has not only improved productivity but also reduced the margin of human error over the past few decades.

questions.question: Idiom: “Hit the nail on the head.” What does this idiom mean?
options: To describe something precisely or correctly
questions.explanation: Hit the nail on the head means to describe something precisely or correctly.

questions.question: Idiom: “Let the cat out of the bag.” What is the meaning of this expression?
questions.explanation: Let the cat out of the bag means to reveal a secret unintentionally.

questions.question: Idiom: “Once in a blue moon.” What does this phrase refer to?
questions.explanation: Once in a blue moon means very rarely.

questions.question: Despite repeated warnings, he to submit the assignment on time.
questions.explanation: Despite repeated warnings, he failed to submit the assignment on time.

questions.question: The manager appreciated her because she always completes her tasks with great .
questions.explanation: Efficiency best completes the sentence because she completes tasks well.

questions.question: The scientist’s theory was initially rejected, but later it was by new research.
questions.explanation: The theory was later supported by new research.

questions.question: Which of the following words is closest in meaning to “Benevolent”?
Select the word that is similar in meaning to ”Plausible”.
